calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for Prov-Up hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret Ashwell.
Phil Killduff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Capital One Bank.
No appearance by Defendant: Reta M. Anderson.
Declaration in lieu of testimony rec'd and filed in court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Reta M. Anderson as follows:
Principal $1,187.43
Attorney's Fees $291.86
Costs not awarded.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Feb. 22, 2005
Judgment granted for Interest in the amount of $538.41, for a total of $2,017.70
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2004 Set For Trial On Jan-24-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
